item.title: 👍Bea Rector - Dept. of Social and Health Services Aging and Long-Term Supports Administration (DSHS ALTSA)
item.description: Bea Rector signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Dept. of Social and Health Services Aging and Long-Term Supports Administration (DSHS ALTSA).

item.title: HCW - Executive action taken by committee.

item.title: Rules Committee relieved of further consideration. Placed on second reading.

item.title: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.
